TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tommy_Remengesau, title = Tommy_Remengesau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tommy_Remengesau} }

S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tommy Remengesau, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Palau anini i ci Tommy Remengesau, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 17 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i to~ummj r…ôm…ôŇč…ôsao~u~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u pa…ĺao~u~u anini i ¶i to~ummj r…ôm…ôŇč…ôsao~u~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tommy Remengesau, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Palau anini i ci Tommy Remengesau, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 17 a romi'ad.
